title: Acilepis tonkinensis
taxonomy: Acilepis tonkinensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Tonkin, which is now part of Vietnam. Acilepis tonkinensis belongs to the genus Acilepis, which is a part of the tribe Anthemideae. The exact classification of Acilepis tonkinensis may also include its order and class, but these are not immediately clear. Further research is needed to determine the full classification of this species.
